name: Execute
description: Execute / Workflows page (/execute). Authored against the SPEC_CI test account, whose Visual-mode session has no Qontinui Runner connected: the page renders a 'Runner Not Connected' gate in place of the workflow library, instructing the operator to start the Runner desktop app. (The workflow library + run-builder only render once a runner is connected — that is operator-session state, not the CI surface.) Asserts the always-present gate the ci-bot account actually sees.

states.name: Runner not connected gate
states.description: Gate shown when no Qontinui Runner is connected to the session (the SPEC_CI test-account default): the 'Runner Not Connected' headline and the start-the-Runner recovery hint that replace the workflow library.

assertions.description: h3 'Runner Not Connected' headlines the gate.
Heading text reads 'Runner Not Connected' (role+text cross-check on the same h3).

target.label: Runner Not Connected heading by role+text

assertions.description: Recovery hint instructs the operator to start the Qontinui Runner desktop app.
